# Andrej Karpathy

## Overview

AI researcher and the originator of the LLM-wiki pattern this vault follows.

## Key Facts

- Posted the foundational thread on LLM-maintained wikis in April 2026
- Advocates for staged autonomy and one-by-one ingest with human oversight
